title: Kilrock PRO Carpet & Textile Cleaner - Enzyme-based stain remover - Breaks down stubborn stains - Fabric and Upholstery Safe, Grey
features: KILROCK PRO CARPET & TEXTILE CLEANER. High performance enzyme-based stain remover
EFFICIENT AND SPECIALISED. Active enzyme formula breaks down stains for easy cleanup
WORKS ON MOST STAINS . Active enzyme formula breaks down stains for easy cleanup
EASY TO USE. Simply spray and wipe away
MADE IN THE UK. From our factory in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, we design, formulate, blend, fill, pack, sell and distribute a full range of specialist household problem-solving and cleaning products
description: Product Description KilrockPRO Carpet & Textile Cleaner enzyme-based formula actively breaks down organic matter, removing stubborn stains at source. The pH-neutral formulation is safe on fabrics and upholstery. Removes tough stains including food, wine, tobacco, tea & coffee, blood, grass, heavy soiling & much more... whilst eradicating unpleasant odours. Ingredients Enzymes, 1,2-Benzisothiazol-3(2H)-one, 2-Octyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one, mixture of 2-methylisothiazolin-3-one and 5-chloro-2-methylisothiazolin-3-one
